properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v2 v3 v2 v2 v4 v5 v6 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to be with You There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to be with You

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: To be with You To be with You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to worship You There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to worship You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to be with You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to be with You There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to worship You

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: There's nothing like Your presence, Lord All I want is to worship

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: You are God and we worship You You are God

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: And we worship You You are God and we worship You
